RESHARD-TRANSFER.summary: Source side: Phase 2 of bulk RDMA reshard. For each of the N slots that the prior RDMA RESHARD registered, encodes the slot's keys into the source's staging buffer, RDMA-WRITEs the bytes to the recipient's landing buffer, then sends RDMA DONE-SLOTS so the recipient backpatches the staged entries into its keyspace.
RESHARD-TRANSFER.complexity: O(N * K) where K is the number of keys per slot.
